title: Genotyping protocol for detection of polymorhisms at codons 146 (N/S/D), 211 (R/Q) and 222 (Q/K) in the caprine PRNP gene
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ekd9t","text":"This Real-Time PCR genotyping protocol can be used for the detection of polymorphisms at codons 146 (N/S/D), 211 (R/Q) and 222 (Q/K) in the caprine PRNP gene. We developed four seperate Real-Time PCR reactions with four different Custom TaqMan® SNP Genotyping Assays (Applied Biosystems, Foster City, California, USA). Each SNP Genotyping Assay consisted of a mix of sequence-specific forward and reverse primers to amplify the polymorphic sequence of interest and two TaqMan® MGB probes, FAM and VIC dye-labeled to detect the amplified product.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":148,"length":4},{"style":"sup","offset":243,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":475,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fu2on","text":"Genotyping Assays (primers and probes) should be stored protected from light and at -20 oC when not in use. Do not perform more than 10 freeze-thaw cycles.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":88,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f8cka","text":"KAPA PROBE FAST qPCR Master Mix should be stored at -20 oC when not in use. Do not perform more than 30 freeze-thaw cycles.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":56,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6o0ll","text":"Avoid repeated freezing and thawing of all reagents.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"f0usn","text":"Always ensure that the Genotyping Assays (primers and probes) have been fully thawed and mixed before use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"bmlo4","text":"Wear appropriate personal protective equipment when handling reagents (gloves, protective clothing)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dsevf","text":"Minimize inhalation of reagents","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a9nf9","text":"Use only with adequate ventilation (fume hood)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: KAPA PROBE FAST qPCR Master Mix (2X): 6.25μl SNP Genotyping Assay Mix (primers and probes) (40X): 0.3125μl Genomic DNA: 1μl (50-80ng) H 2 O: 4.9375μl
Initial Denaturation Step: 95 o C - 3min 45 cycles Denaturation: 95 o C - 3sec Primer annealing/extension: 62 o C - 30sec
Genotypes were detected through amplification plots with QPCR Applied Biosystems Step One Software v2.3
creator: Sotiria Vouraki
